inline_comments.message:
it probably doesn't work as expected:
2 packages were missing in our latest platform I had to download them again explicitly using:
yumdownloader --resolve python-docker-pycreds python-websocket-client

it produced:
python-websocket-client-0.32.0-116.el7.noarch.rpm
python-docker-pycreds-0.3.0-8.el7_6.noarch.rpm
I verified it once again and it works. It was probably an error between my chair and my keyboard during the transfer of the repo from my build server to the resources
